name: Sausage Blankets
recipeIngredient: 30 cocktail hot dogs, OR your favorite sausage (cut into 2-inch lengths)
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the filling by combining the cheese, onions, and savory. Mix thoroughly.
2. Prepare the sour cream pastry: Combine all ingredients and knead lightly.
3. Divide dough into two equal halves. Roll each half into a rectangle measuring 7 1/2 inches x 12 1/2 inches.
4. Cut the dough into 2 1/2-inch squares using a knife or pie fluter.
5. Place a teaspoon of the cheese-onion filling in the center of each square.
6. Lay a cocktail hot dog diagonally across the center of each square, on top of the cheese filling.
7. Wet the diagonal corners with water and press together to seal.
8. Arrange the blankets on a well-greased baking sheet and brush with beaten egg.
9. Bake for 20 minutes at 350°F (175°C), or until golden brown. Serve hot.
Do-Ahead Note:
Prepare the sausage blankets several days in advance, freeze them in a moisture-proof container, and bake for 10 minutes at 350°F before serving.
